meta.purpose: Capability stages, practice loops, and measurable indicators.
meta.load_condition: Load for learning, team standards, audits, or progressive quality improvement.

stages.name: Profile-driven performance
indicators: every animation profiled on throttled hardware
frame budget defined and enforced per interaction
will-change used sparingly and cleaned up
scroll performance tested with 6x CPU slowdown

stages.name: Performance engineering culture
indicators: animation frame budget enforced in CI
device tier matrix defines animation complexity per tier

evolution_layers.name: Animation hygiene → Profile-driven performance
evolution_layers.capability: Progress from Animation hygiene to Profile-driven performance

evolution_layers.name: Profile-driven performance → Performance engineering culture
evolution_layers.capability: Progress from Profile-driven performance to Performance engineering culture

measurement.how: Track frames_per_second_at_budget over iterations of the practice loop.
Track layout_trigger_count over iterations of the practice loop.
Track forced_sync_layout_count over iterations of the practice loop.
Track gpu_memory_usage_mb over iterations of the practice loop.
Track scroll_jank_percentage over iterations of the practice loop.
Track reduced_motion_coverage over iterations of the practice loop.
